thermal_diagram.label: Generic test item thermal paths
thermal_diagram.summary: Vacuum reduces air coupling, so the thermal shroud becomes the dominant radiative boundary while the platen/interface remains a weaker conductive path for a generic satellite-like test item.
notes: Air convection collapses during pumpdown, making shroud radiation visible in the slow node.
The platen/interface is present but intentionally weaker for this generic satellite-like configuration.
